units.name: var-data.mount
units.contents:
[Unit]
Description=Mount data disk

[Mount]
What=/dev/disk/by-partlabel/data
Where=/var/data
Type=xfs

[Install]
WantedBy=local-fs.target

units.name: mkube-agent.service
units.contents:
[Unit]
Description=mkube job agent (container)
After=network-online.target var-data.mount podman.socket
Wants=network-online.target
Requires=var-data.mount podman.socket

[Service]
Type=simple
Restart=always
RestartSec=5
ExecStartPre=/bin/bash -c 'echo Waiting for DNS...; for i in $(seq 1 60); do getent hosts registry.gt.lo && exit 0; sleep 2; done; echo DNS timeout; exit 1'
ExecStartPre=-/usr/bin/podman rm -f mkube-agent
ExecStartPre=-/usr/bin/podman pull --tls-verify=false --arch amd64 registry.gt.lo:5000/rawhidedev:latest
ExecStartPre=-/usr/bin/podman pull --tls-verify=false --arch amd64 registry.gt.lo:5000/fedoradev:latest
ExecStart=/usr/bin/podman run --name mkube-agent --rm --network host --privileged -v /var/data:/data -v /run/podman/podman.sock:/run/podman/podman.sock -e MKUBE_API=http://192.168.200.2:8082 -e CONTAINER_HOST=unix:///run/podman/podman.sock --pull=always --arch amd64 registry.gt.lo:5000/mkube-agent:edge
ExecStop=/usr/bin/podman stop mkube-agent
TimeoutStartSec=900
StandardOutput=journal
StandardError=journal

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
